title: Comparison Examples List Response Schema
description: Success-envelope response schema for GET /api/v1/optimization-comparisons/{comparison_id}/examples. Route is wrapped (optimization_comparison_routes). The data field contains the payload from OptimizationComparisonService.list_examples with offset-based pagination.

success.description: Discriminator — always true for success responses

schema_version.description: Version of the comparison payload schema

available_views.description: View modes available for this comparison (e.g. overview, run_matrix, trial_details)

runs.description: Summary metadata for each run in the comparison

total_examples.description: Total number of examples in this run

items.description: Per-example comparison row with per-run measures and status

pagination.description: Offset-based pagination metadata for this endpoint (uses limit/offset rather than page/per_page)

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

offset.description: Offset of the first returned item

total.description: Total number of matching examples (after filtering)

has_more.description: Whether more items exist beyond the current page
